obligations.nl_gloss: The returned counts vector aligns with the denomination vector.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (denoms : Denoms) (amt : Nat), Decomposes denoms (coinChangeCanonical denoms amt) amt
obligations.nl_gloss: The returned counts decompose the target amount.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (denoms : Denoms) (amt : Nat) (alt : Counts), Canonical denoms → Decomposes denoms alt amt → (coinChangeCanonical denoms amt).sum ≤ alt.sum
obligations.nl_gloss: When the denomination system is canonical, the greedy count sum is at most any competing valid decomposition's sum.
